title: File System Operations
description: Build reactive file read and write components using Node.js APIs.
read_intro: The Read component loads a file and passes its content as an accessor to a render callback. Children receive the content reactively.
write_intro: The Write component watches a content accessor with createEffect. When the content changes, it writes to disk. The untrack guard prevents re-writing the same content.
usage_intro: Compose Read and Write to build pipelines that transform file content reactively:
file_memory_intro: The most common file system pattern in CReact is the FileMemory implementation for state persistence:
